Hint Username: Use a unique username with English letters, numbers, dashes, or underscores.
Hint User Email: Enter a valid email address for sign-in or notifications.
Hint User Password: Use a clear and secure password for the new user.
Hint User Expiration Date: Optional, and useful when the account should expire on a specific date.
Hint User Arabic Name: Enter the full Arabic name exactly as it should appear in the system.
Hint User English Name: Optional, but recommended for English-facing screens and reports.
Arabic user name is required and must be: Arabic user name is required and must be valid.
English user name must be valid.
Hint User Active: Enable this when the user should be allowed to sign in and use the system.
Hint User Roles: Select one or more roles to define the user access level inside the system.
Hint Privilege Arabic Name: Enter the Arabic privilege name exactly as it should appear inside the system.
Hint Privilege English Name: Enter a clear English privilege name for English-facing screens and reports.
Hint Privilege Code: Use a unique uppercase English code with underscores for guards, policies, and navigation rules.
Hint Privilege Order: Set the display order starting from 0 or higher.
Privilege Arabic name is required and mu: Privilege Arabic name is required and must be valid.
Privilege English name is required and m: Privilege English name is required and must be valid.
Privilege code is required and must be v: Privilege code is required and must be valid.
Privilege order is required and must be: Privilege order is required and must be zero or greater.
Hint Role Name: Enter the internal role name used by the system.
Hint Role Arabic Name: Enter the Arabic display name exactly as users should see it.
Hint Role English Name: Enter the English display name used in English screens and reports.
Hint Role Privileges: Select at least one privilege to grant through this role.
Role name is required and must be valid.

Role English display name is required an: Role English display name is required and must be valid.
At least one privilege is required.

Hint Fleet Email: Optional, but use a valid email for operational communication.
Example Fleet Description: Example: The main fleet responsible for booking and operations in Riyadh.
